goal: Add a side-effect-free execution preflight builder that validates cockpit patch consume application authority is ready for later execution while keeping permit consume, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, packages, workflows, deployment, DB, providers, GitHub, and writes closed.
scope_out: Do not consume permits, apply patches, mutate server files, mutate route files, call providers, call DB, call GitHub, change package files, workflows, deployment files, or write files.
claims: Ready cockpit patch consume application authority can be preflighted for later execution without applying it.
Execution preflight ref, executor ref, and execution policy ref are required.
Permit consume and patch application remain false.
assumptions: Actual permit consumption and patch execution require later task locks.
dod: Ready, missing execution ref, and blocked authority cases are tested.
Focused test, typecheck, task-lock verify, and diff-check pass.
stop_conditions: Permit consumption, patch application, server mutation, route mutation, external calls, DB, GitHub, package, workflow, deployment, or write changes become necessary.
prior_task_findings: BPK-127 recorded side-effect-free cockpit patch consume application authority without consuming the permit or applying a patch.
